violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Raw animal foods (such as veal cutlets) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as marinated tomatoes and pickles) in the 2-door reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the following units: the 1-door dessert fridge, 2-door reach-in #2, the 3-door reach-in, cookline prep unit #2, and 2-door reach-in #3. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and hood system have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The floor grout in the salad prep/dessert area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2027

Raw animal foods such as shrimp were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as chicken and lobster in the 3 door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

ROP lobster was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. ROP lobster was observed at 30 DF and taken out of ROP packaging at the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The gaskets for the dessert 1 door reach-in, 3 door reach-in, and walk-in freezer was in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and hood system have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

No person on site had required food safety manager training. A on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The hand-washing sink on the cooking line was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Deli Meat and sliced cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. On the 2 door line cooler, and Sandwich prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Handles on the bar fridge were observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. All surfaces of food equipment must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2024
The grout between the tiles located on the back side of the cooking line are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The hose to the grease trap is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. CA - Spoke with PIC parts are on order to repair grease trap. Establishment to send RIDOH photo of fixed grease trap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

A fish delivery was observed received at 48 degrees f (scrod, steamers, little necks). Establishment moved items to separate location. Items will be returned Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. Time and date of last used were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Ready to eat dressing was observed with a scoop with out a handle submerged inside of it. Scoops must have a handle to avoid contamination of food products. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Raw animal foods (veal) were observed stored with ready-to-eat foods in the prep unit refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, knives, buffalo slicer, tomato slicer, coffee cups, dishes and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items, were cleaned and sanitized. Ice was removed from machine and disposed of. Establishment to clean ice machine and provide evidence of cleaning to RIDOH. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Ravioli was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ravioli, was only received a short time before. Ravioli was moved to freezer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Misc. Items, Calamai, mashed potatoes, fish was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Marsala sauce was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Reduced Oxygen Pack Fish was observed thawing with out a hole in the package. Fish was in temperature. Fish in ROP must have air reintroduction in the thawing process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Thermometers are lacking from refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Working containers of food are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

A splash guard is needed on the hand sink on the line in the kitchen. Bowls were observed in the splash zone. Bowl were sent to be wash rinsed and sanitized. A splash guard is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
Produce and ground beef were observed stored on the floor in the walk in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Food items were observed in the walk in and in the ice creamer freezer uncovered. Food items must be covered to prevent contamination from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Food Employees must protect their personal clothes from coming in contact with food contact surfaces. Corrective Action - Staff put on an apron. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was measured at 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for Quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of chicken marsala, onions were observed in a bowl on top of potatoes. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment (salad dishes) and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
Various Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The dough sheeter was observed with tape holding components together. Equipment must be kept in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The cutting boards in the bar are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the rack above the dough sheeter have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The dumpster outside was observed with an accumulation of liter and debris. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. The area must be kept free of liter, standing water. The receptacles were in poor condition and must have operational lids. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
The hose to the grease trap is in poor repair. The foundation was observed with a hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
